raw:
CONCORD - Feedback

- The server display column should be tucked away after the server is chosen and only expanded when the user clicks a button
optimized:
### OPT-001: Collapse server list sidebar after server selection
Modify Concord chat UI: auto-collapse the server list sidebar once a server is selected. Add a toggle button to re-expand it on demand. Default state post-selection: collapsed. Preserve current selection state while collapsed.

Source: "The server display column should be tucked away after the server is chosen and only expanded when the user clicks a button"
